title: API reference default base URL conflicts with setup instructions
reasoning: GettingStarted instructs developers to configure the frontend with VITE_API_URL=/api and says the backend runs on port 3001, but APIReference falls back to displaying http://localhost:5000 when VITE_API_URL is absent. A developer who opens the docs before setting env vars gets a stale base URL that contradicts the setup guide and can send API requests to the wrong service.
recommendation: Make the fallback match the documented setup, for example '/api' if Vite proxying is expected, or 'http://localhost:3001' if direct backend calls are expected. Also keep the displayed Base URL text in sync with GettingStarted.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No docs rendering or content consistency tests were provided, so mismatched setup snippets and displayed constants are not checked.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a small test or static assertion that APIReference's fallback base URL matches the base URL documented in GettingStarted.
minimumFixScope: Change API_BASE_URL in src/pages/docs/sections/APIReference.jsx, and update GettingStarted only if the intended local API base is different.

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths still exist, but the APIReference line changed from `http://localhost:5000` to `http://localhost:5000/api` at `src/pages/docs/sections/APIReference.jsx:5`. The inconsistency remains: `GettingStarted.jsx:106` still documents `VITE_API_URL=/api`, `GettingStarted.jsx:177` still says the backend runs on port 3001, while APIReference displays a fallback of `http://localhost:5000/api`. Current app code also uses `/api` as the runtime fallback in `src/services/api.js:1` and `src/pages/TelecallerDashboard.jsx:13`, so the API reference default remains out of sync with the setup docs and runtime fallback. Additional repository evidence shows `vite.config.js` proxies `/api` to `http://localhost:5000`, and server env/defaults use port 5000, so the `port 3001` setup text is also stale. I attempted to run `npm run lint`, but the command was rejected by the execution policy; package.json has no test script.
commands: Get-Location; git status --short; rg -n "API_BASE_URL|VITE_API_URL|Runs on port|localhost:5000|localhost:3001" src/pages/docs/sections

rg -n "^VITE_API_URL|^PORT" .env .env.example server/.env server/.env.example README.md RENDER_DEPLOYMENT.md vite.config.js src/pages/docs/sections/APIReference.jsx src/pages/docs/sections/GettingStarted.jsx src/services/api.js
